body:

| | Peter,

It's become unpolitically correct to say "Jesus is the reason for the season." But I can't keep quiet about it.

So when the Christmas season rolls around I can't treat it like just another holiday because, for me and my family, it is so much more than that.

>From our family to yours we hope you have a very Merry Christmas. This season always makes us reflect gratefully on the blessings of the Lord and all he has done for our family.

Please take a moment to pray for those who can't be with their families today as they fight to defend our country overseas. Their sacrifice allows us to safely and freely practice our faith in our homes tonight.

May you experience the joy of Christ's birth this Christmas season, filled with peace, joy and happiness.

Merry Christmas,
[](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=d4565427a6&e=90fad69796)

subject: There's something special about Christmas at Mimi's
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b62032f25219/calling-all-patriots-12102309?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=6d43cf2344&e=795c6d9796)
---
| Peter, **John 1:4. “In him was life and the life was the light of men.”**
---
| At this time of year, families come together in all types, sizes and age groups to reflect the joy of the season.

Whether it is attending a holiday celebration at your place of worship or joining together in “Mimi’s Christmas cookie baking party,” everyone leaves with a sense of a bond to that first family formed when Christ was given to us.
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| My prayer for this joyous season is that you and your family experience the love and joy given to each of us by the birth of Christ and the love that came from that first family. We are a dedicated Christian family and always value this time of year for how it deepens our faith. I'm lucky to be able to spend this day with my adorable grandkids and have been doing my best to spoil them rotten like every grandmother does. Everything I do is for their future, we have to leave behind a country they can be proud of.
---
|
---
| Merry Christmas, and please also take a moment to pray for the soldiers abroad who cannot be with their families this season as they fight to defend our freedoms. It is because of their sacrifice that our families can peacefully and freely celebrate the joyous day of Christmas. For Freedom,

[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=4558fa65ab&e=795c6d9796)

name: Jason Lewis
subject: Merry Christmas🎄
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate
body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/e1260e508dc866c0/d93b3cec99533f12c3d6b838967d376c/33183) Fellow Conservative, In this season of peace, giving, and hope, Leigh and I wanted to take a brief moment to wish you and yours a very merry Christmas.

Today my family is enjoying a brief break from the campaign trail, and we’re taking the time to remember the reason for this season – the birth of our Savior Jesus Christ.

We are also reflecting on all the blessings we’ve received this year while living in the greatest nation on earth. And this nation stays great thanks to the brave men and women serving in the military. I hope that you will find a moment today to offer up a prayer for them and the families. I wish you and your loved ones a very Merry Christmas.

For Minnesota and America, | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/e1260e508dc866c0/24bf5214449ac34ec3d6b838967d376c/33183) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/e1260e508dc866c0/420d4a224f38f36ec3d6b838967d376c/33183) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/e1260e508dc866c0/896e4ad44f422ba3c3d6b838967d376c/33183)

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/iiI6VODZVIU9hlW0kJAAbvwAb7CzRzdJpR23gdKB7vs=/ZK7SrMfOdaXMsiHJwDvYYrVmFZIJu3xAP-Qaax792ko=?recurring=auto&amount=22&refcode=20191225email)
---
Friend, I wanted to take a moment to wish you a Merry Christmas, Happy Hanukkah, and a happy holiday season to all! We are incredibly proud of what our movement has accomplished this year, and it wouldn't have been possible without your support, friend. I feel truly blessed and humbled to have you standing with me. And as I look ahead, I'm optimistic about everything we will accomplish next year as well, restoring reason, compassion, and decency, across the country and right here in Texas! So, this holiday season, I hope you find the time to recharge and reconnect with friends and family -- because when the new year begins, we'll need to get right back to work fighting for a better life for all families. Today, I also want to pause to send special holiday wishes to our brave men and women in the military, foreign service, and everyone serving our country abroad right now. As you may know, I proudly served almost 15 years overseas. So, I know all too well the sacrifice these brave Americans are making to be away from their loved ones during the holidays. To them I say: Please know you have our love and respect for the job you are doing protecting our country -- we wish you a safe and swift return and we thank you for your service. No matter where you are or how you celebrate -- whether you're trimming the tree, lighting the menorah, or simply enjoying time with those you love -- I wish you a warm and joyful holiday season! In gratitude,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: 1863 has a lot to teach us in 2019
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
A timeless message for Christmas | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fd72f2d86c2a/1863-has-a-lot-to-teach-us-in-2019?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| | Henry Wadsworth Longfellow wrote these words on Christmas Day during the Civil War...

_I heard the bells on Christmas day
Their old familiar carols play,
And wild and sweet the words repeat
Of peace on earth, good will to men.
And in despair I bowed my head:
“There is no peace on earth,” I said,
“For hate is strong and mocks the song
Of peace on earth, good will to men.”
Then pealed the bells more loud and deep:
“God is not dead, nor doth he sleep;
The wrong shall fail, the right prevail,
With peace on earth, good will to men._

**During one of the darkest times in America’s history – there was hope**.
---
|
---
| I suppose that’s why this poem, later recorded as a song, means so much to me.

It’s a constant reminder that no matter what difficulties surround us, our God is a living God...and he will prevail.

But there is more to this poem than just hope for peace.

It contains the means toward peace – goodwill toward men.

When we are kind, when we are the light of the world as Christ commands and when we share goodwill toward our fellow man, we bring peace to the world around us.

**Today I pray we let the spirit of Christmas renew our commitment for peace on earth through goodwill to men.**
---
|
---
| Wishing you and yours a very Merry Christmas.

God bless you.

Kathleen Wall

| Dear Friend,

Today is a day of blessings, and indeed **I can think of no greater blessing than to have the opportunity to fight for you in the U.S. Senate.**

Throughout 2019, I asked you repeatedly for your support and each time, you came through. **From my family to yours, thank you,_truly_.**

As we restfully reflect on this Christmas Day, I wish you nothing but peace, harmony and joy. Your energy and positive thoughts keep me going and I look forward to what 2020 will bring.

_**May your fires be warm and loved ones always near.**_

Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**

_For the People_
Republican for U.S. Senate

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Wishing you peace, love, and joy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| | | Friend,

This week, I'm spending some time back at home in Denver with Susan and the girls, reflecting on the year we've just had and the exciting times that lie ahead of us.

I couldn't be more grateful for the experiences we've shared and for the support and commitment of this team as we fight to build a better future for our country. Thank you for everything.

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba89e/134673f2/97b9e4e/69979f91/1960273731/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
As we gather together with family, friends, and neighbors in the warmth of the holiday season, it's a time to reflect on the democracy we are fighting for and the values we share. When we think about integrity, fairness, and patriotism, and when we talk to our kids about them, we should be able to point to the president as an example. It's time to restore those core American values to the White House.

If we do that, we will not only create more opportunity for the next generation, but also continue the hard work of making our nation more fair, more democratic, and more free.

From our family to yours, we wish everyone peace, love, and joy throughout the year to come. Happy holidays!

Gratefully,

Michael, Susan, Caroline, Halina, and Anne

name: Tom Steyer
subject: Today is the day for my tie to truly shine
body:
| | | |
---
---
Friend, I’m taking just a couple of days away from the campaign trail to spend time with Kat and the kids. We’re getting ready for our annual round of basketball after presents (I will be redeemed this year!), and I’m looking forward to enjoying Christmas dinner later with my entire family. However you’re spending today, I hope you’re surrounded by those you love most. As our nation faces challenges to the values and beliefs we hold dear, I know that it has been a difficult year for many among us. I hope you know that I’m grateful for you and for the work we’ve done together this year. Merry Christmas and a joyous holiday season, friend, from my home to yours.
---
---
P.S. I wanted to share this photo with you from my family’s 2019 Christmas card — today is the day for my favorite tie to truly shine.
---
